She is often depicted as a Naga princess—the daughter of the serpentine Naga King who rules the underwater world. Soma, often referred to in Khmer sources as Neang Neak (នាងនាគ, litt. Dragon Woman), stands in the chronicles as the first known monarch of Cambodia and as its first queen.
